use_cases: Display social media profile links with platform-specific gradient styling on personal portfolios
Add shareable social contact options to website footers or sidebars
Provide quick access to multiple social platforms in a visually cohesive card component
Enable floating social links panel for increased visibility and user engagement
Support responsive social link display with mobile toggle functionality
ai_summary: A social links card component that renders clickable social media icons (LinkedIn, Instagram, GitHub, Mail, Facebook, X, Dribbble, Website) with platform-specific gradient styling and hover effects. Features dark mode support, customizable floating button color, and optional mobile visibility toggle for integrating social profiles across web applications.
